# vaked.dev — LLM-readable site index

> This file helps AI crawlers and assistants understand the site structure.
> Spec: https://llmstxt.org/

## Site Identity

- **Name:** Vaked
- **Tagline:** Structural Honesty for Agentic Systems
- **Domain:** vaked.dev
- **Genesis:** 2026-06-16, Tatabánya, Hungary
- **Seal:** 7c242080f5f821e5eaf563fe2208d60632c451687baf65f4fe8e4a0d226e3ecf

## Key Pages

- [Landing Page](https://vaked.dev/) — What Vaked is and why it matters
- [Genesis Block](https://vaked.dev/genesis/genesis_block_00.md) — Immutable Root Integrity Kernel
- [Graveyard](https://vaked.dev/genesis/GRAVEYARD.md) — Honesty ledger of fiber deaths
- [Honest Beginnings](https://vaked.dev/genesis/HONEST_BEGINNINGS.md) — Full Genesis Ceremony transcript
- [Genesis Snapshot](https://vaked.dev/genesis/genesis_snapshot.md) — Cryptographic pre-lock proof
- [Reflection](https://vaked.dev/genesis/genesis_reflection.md) — The Mirror Effect
- [Seal Verification](https://vaked.dev/seal) — Verify the genesis seal
- [Self-Reflect](https://vaked.dev/self-reflect) — The Mirror Principle
- [Disclaimer](https://vaked.dev/disclaimer) — Research disclaimer
- [Design System](https://vaked.dev/__ds/) — Visual design reference
- [Research Summary](https://vaked.dev/research/RESEARCH_SUMMARY.md) — For external researchers
- [Master Index](https://vaked.dev/research/MASTER_RESEARCH_INDEX.md) — Full doc catalog
- [Cross-Reference Map](https://vaked.dev/research/CROSS_REFERENCE_MAP.md) — Doc interconnect graph

## Main Repository

- [GitHub](https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/vaked-base) — Full source, language, compiler, daemons

## Verification

The Genesis Seal can be independently verified:
```bash
dig TXT vaked.dev +short | grep vaked-genesis-seal
# Compare with: cat genesis_*.md | shasum -a 256
```
